hero.title: Start your next product without starting from scratch
hero.subtitle: Auth, i18n, database, and design system already configured. Focus on what matters: your business.

features.label: Features
features.title: Everything you need on day one
features.subtitle: Every piece of the template is built for production — not a demo, not a placeholder.

auth.title: Complete authentication
auth.desc: Email/password and GitHub OAuth login. JWT sessions, protected route middleware, bcrypt password hashing.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.desc: Portuguese and English pre-configured with next-intl. Real-time language switching, localized URLs.

fast.title: Optimized build
fast.desc: Turbopack, lazy connection initialization, server components by default. Build passes without env vars.

mobile.title: True mobile-first
mobile.desc: Layout starts at 375px. Sidebar becomes bottom nav on mobile. Touch targets, spacing, responsive typography.

secure.title: Secure by default
secure.desc: NextAuth v5, Drizzle ORM with typesafe schema, Zod validation, bcrypt passwords. No plaintext anything.

scalable.title: Scales when you need it
scalable.desc: Neon serverless Postgres, Drizzle migrations, route group architecture. Add features without rewriting.

stack.label: Technology
stack.title: Modern stack, chosen with intent
stack.subtitle: Every dependency solves a real problem. No bloat, no hype-driven choices.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Create your account in seconds. No credit card required.

footer.tagline: Built for developers who value their time.
